title: 400 PCS Drinking Straws Paper Flexible Straw Drinking Tube Colourful Paper Straws 19.7 cm x 6 mm Straw for Wedding Party Restaurant Juice Coffee Cold Drinks Dessert DIY Decoration
features: 【Premium Eco-Friendly Straws】A set of 400 colorful paper straws. Made from high-quality, biodegradable paper, these straws are a sustainable alternative to plastic. They are toxin-free, odorless, and taste-neutral, ensuring a pure drinking experience. Perfect for juices, smoothies, cocktails, and iced coffee, these straws stay sturdy without getting soggy

【Flexible & Durable Design】Unlike standard rigid paper straws, these feature a bendable design for easy sipping from any angle. Measuring 197mm (7.78 inches) with a 6mm (0.25-inch) diameter, they fit most cups and glasses. The multi-layered construction prevents collapsing, even in thick drinks like milkshakes

【Temperature Resistant】These straws hold up in both hot and cold drinks, from iced tea to warm cocoa (0°C to 60°C). The thick paper and water-resistant adhesive ensure they last through the entire drink without disintegrating

【Perfect for Events & DIY Crafts】Beyond drinks, use them for cake pops, decorations, or kids’ crafts. A must-have for eco-conscious hosts, event planners, and businesses looking to reduce plastic waste

【Vibrant Colours for Every Occasion】Paper Straws' bright, striped patterns add a festive touch to any drink. Great for weddings, birthday parties, baby showers, and holidays. The food-safe ink won’t fade or bleed, keeping beverages looking as good as they taste. Ideal for both home use and commercial settings like cafes and restaurants
description: Product Name: 400 Pack Biodegradable Paper Straws Color: Assorted striped colours Quantity: 400 straws Size: 197mm (length) x 6mm (diameter) Material: High-quality biodegradable paper, food-safe ink Function: Drinking, party décor, crafting Purpose: Eco-friendly alternative to plastic straws for home, events, and businesses.
